title: Enforce mTLS in the payments namespace with Istio
scenario: The security team has mandated that all service-to-service traffic in the `payments` namespace must be encrypted with mutual TLS. Two Deployments (`payment-api` and `fraud-check`) are already running there. Apply an Istio PeerAuthentication policy that requires STRICT mTLS for all inbound traffic.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: payments-mtls
  namespace: payments
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE

hints.text: PERMISSIVE allows both plaintext and mTLS — fine for migration, dangerous for compliance. STRICT requires mTLS for every inbound connection.
Change `mode: PERMISSIVE` to `mode: STRICT`. That is the only change needed.
A PeerAuthentication with no selector applies to all pods in the namespace. STRICT mode will reject any plaintext connection.

solution:
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: payments-mtls
  namespace: payments
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
